tools.name: get_cached
tools.description:
Retrieve a cached large response by ID.
        
        When tool responses exceed 2KB, they are cached and a compact summary
        is returned with a cache_id. Use this tool to retrieve the full response.
        
        Args:
            cache_id: The cache ID (e.g., 'r1', 'r2') from a previous response
        
        Returns:
            The full cached response, or error if not found

tools.name: clear_cache
tools.description:
Clear the response cache to free memory.
        
        Returns:
            Confirmation with number of items cleared

tools.name: forward
tools.description:
Run inference through the quine brain.
        
        Args:
            text: Text input for multi-modal brains
            embedding: Optional pre-computed embedding (384-dim)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with inference result summary (truncated for readability)

tools.name: deliberate
tools.description:
Use slow-thinking deliberation for complex reasoning.
        
        Args:
            question: The question to deliberate on
            context: Optional context to consider
        
        Returns:
            JSON with deliberation result and reasoning trace

tools.name: imagine
tools.description:
Use imagination/world model to simulate future states.
        
        Args:
            scenario: Starting scenario description
            steps: Number of imagination steps
        
        Returns:
            JSON with imagined trajectory

tools.name: embed_text
tools.description:
Generate embedding for text input.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to embed
        
        Returns:
            JSON with embedding vector

tools.name: get_provenance
tools.description:
Get full provenance chain for this capsule.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with genesis hash, lineage, and cascade data

tools.name: bag_get
tools.description:
Retrieve item from FelixBag memory.
        
        Args:
            key: Key to retrieve
        
        Returns:
            JSON with value or error

tools.name: bag_put
tools.description:
Store item in FelixBag memory.
        
        Args:
            key: Key to store under
            value: Value to store (string)
        
        Returns:
            Confirmation JSON

tools.name: list_slots
tools.description:
List available council slots for model plugging.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with slot status

tools.name: plug_model
tools.description:
Plug an external model into a council slot.
        
        Args:
            model_id: HuggingFace model ID or path
            slot_name: Optional slot name (uses model name if not provided)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with plug result

tools.name: spawn_swarm
tools.description:
Spawn a swarm of child agents.
        
        Args:
            count: Number of agents to spawn
        
        Returns:
            JSON with swarm info

tools.name: replicate
tools.description:
Create a self-replicating clone of this capsule.
        
        Args:
            output_path: Optional path for the clone
        
        Returns:
            JSON with clone path

tools.name: verify_integrity
tools.description:
Verify quine brain merkle hash integrity.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with verification result

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description:
List all available capabilities of this capsule.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with capability manifest

tools.name: start_rerun_viewer
tools.description:
Start Rerun visualization viewer for observing inference.

        If a Rerun viewer is already running (from TUI init), this reuses
        that recording instead of creating a duplicate.

        Args:
            recording_name: Optional name for this recording session

        Returns:
            JSON with viewer status

tools.name: log_to_rerun
tools.description:
Log data to Rerun viewer for visualization.
        
        Args:
            entity_path: Path in rerun hierarchy (e.g., 'brain/inference/step_1')
            data_type: Type of data - 'scalar', 'text', 'tensor', 'point3d', 'log'
            value: The value to log (JSON string for complex types)
        
        Returns:
            Confirmation JSON

tools.name: rerun_log_inference
tools.description:
Run inference and log full pipeline to Rerun for debugging.
        
        Args:
            text: Optional text input
            step: Optional step number (auto-increments if not provided)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with inference result and Rerun log status

tools.name: rerun_log_evolution
tools.description:
Log full evolution history to Rerun as time series.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with log status

tools.name: rerun_log_provenance
tools.description:
Log the capsule provenance spine into Rerun.

        Rerun is only the visual surface. CASCADE/provenance remains the
        proof source; this tool makes the proof spine visible before auth,
        provider, and slot-plugging work begins.

tools.name: rerun_log_auth_event
tools.description:
Log a redacted auth/provisioning event into Rerun.

        The event intentionally does not display tokens, API keys, OAuth
        codes, or raw response bodies. Sensitive detail is reduced to a
        deterministic evidence hash so CASCADE/Rerun can correlate events
        without becoming a secret store.

tools.name: chat
tools.description:
Multi-turn chat with LLM in a slot.
        
        Args:
            message: User message
            slot: Specific slot index (None = first LLM found)
            system_prompt: Optional system prompt for first message
        
        Returns:
            JSON with assistant response and conversation state

tools.name: chat_reset
tools.description:
Reset chat conversation history.
        
        Returns:
            Confirmation JSON

tools.name: chat_history
tools.description:
Get current chat conversation history.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with full conversation

tools.name: agent_chat
tools.description: Interactive agentic session for a slot using workflow-agent semantics.

tools.name: batch_forward
tools.description:
Run batch inference on multiple inputs.
        
        Args:
            inputs: List of input strings or dicts
        
        Returns:
            JSON with list of results

tools.name: batch_embed
tools.description:
Generate embeddings for multiple texts.
        
        Args:
            texts: List of strings to embed
        
        Returns:
            JSON with list of embeddings

tools.name: pipe
tools.description:
Chain outputs between slots. Each slot's output becomes next slot's input.

        Args:
            input_text: Initial input text
            pipeline: List of slot indices to chain through, e.g. [0, 2, 1]

        Returns:
            JSON with intermediate and final results

tools.name: compare
tools.description:
Run same input through multiple slots and compare outputs.
        
        Args:
            input_text: Input to test
            slots: List of slot indices to compare (None = all plugged slots)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with outputs from each slot for comparison

tools.name: invoke_slot
tools.description:
Invoke a specific slot by index with explicit mode control.

        Args:
            slot: Slot index to invoke
            text: Input text
            mode: 'auto', 'embed', 'generate', 'classify', 'forward', 'transcribe', or 'synthesize'
            max_tokens: Override max generation tokens (0 = use model default)
            messages: Optional structured message list for chat models.
                      List of dicts with 'role' and 'content' keys.
                      When provided, overrides text for generation mode.

        Returns:
            JSON with slot output

tools.name: hub_search
tools.description:
Search HuggingFace Hub for models.
        
        Args:
            query: Search query (model name, task, etc.)
            limit: Max results per page (default 50)
            page: Page number (default 1)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with model list

tools.name: hub_search_datasets
tools.description:
Search HuggingFace Hub for datasets.
        
        Args:
            query: Search query (dataset name, task, topic)
            limit: Max results per page (default 50)
            page: Page number (default 1)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with dataset list

tools.name: hub_top
tools.description:
Get top trending models from HuggingFace Hub.
        
        Args:
            task: Filter by task (text-generation, feature-extraction, etc.)
            limit: Max results per page
            page: Page number
        
        Returns:
            JSON with top models

tools.name: hub_info
tools.description:
Get detailed information about a HuggingFace model.
        
        Args:
            model_id: Full model ID (e.g., 'google/embeddinggemma-300m')
        
        Returns:
            JSON with model details

tools.name: hub_download
tools.description:
Download a model from HuggingFace Hub.
        
        Args:
            model_id: Full model ID to download
        
        Returns:
            JSON with download path

tools.name: hub_tasks
tools.description:
List available HuggingFace task types.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with task categories

tools.name: vast_search
tools.description:
Search Vast.ai for GPU rental offers.
        
        Args:
            query: Search query (e.g., 'gpu_ram>=48', 'rentable=true')
            page: Page number
            page_size: Results per page
        
        Returns:
            JSON with GPU offers

tools.name: vast_details
tools.description:
Get detailed specs for a Vast.ai GPU offer.

        Args:
            offer_index: Offer number from vast_search results

        Returns:
            JSON with full GPU specifications

tools.name: vast_rent
tools.description:
Rent a GPU instance on vast.ai with full Ouroboros facilities.
        
        Args:
            instance_id: Instance ID from vast_search results
            image: Docker image (default: vastai/pytorch - pre-cached, SSH-compatible)
            disk: Disk space in GB (default: 50 for model weights)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with rental confirmation
        
        Note: Uses vastai/pytorch base image which is:
        - Pre-cached on most hosts (fast startup)
        - Compatible with Vast's SSH launch mode
        - Includes CUDA dev libraries, node, OpenCL
        
        Automatically installs Ouroboros inference stack on boot:
        - transformers, accelerate, bitsandbytes (plain/BnB causal LMs)
        - optimum (native GPTQ support)
        - sentence-transformers (embeddings)
        - vllm (high-throughput inference)
        - flash-attn (fast attention)

tools.name: vast_instances
tools.description:
List your active Vast.ai GPU instances.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with active instances including HTTP URLs

tools.name: vast_stop
tools.description:
Stop and destroy a Vast.ai instance.
        
        Args:
            instance_id: Instance ID to destroy
        
        Returns:
            JSON with status

tools.name: vast_ready
tools.description:
Check if a Vast.ai instance is ready with Ouroboros stack installed.
        
        Args:
            instance_id: Instance ID to check
        
        Returns:
            JSON with readiness status, wait guidance, and available capabilities

tools.name: vast_run
tools.description:
Execute Python code on a remote Vast.ai GPU instance.
        
        This is the core remote execution facility - run ANY Python on rented GPU.
        Use for model loading, inference, training, or any GPU-accelerated task.
        
        Args:
            instance_id: Instance ID to run on
            code: Python code to execute (will be run via python -c)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with stdout, stderr, and return code

tools.name: vast_load_model
tools.description:
Prepare a remote GPU model server and attach it locally as a normal slot.
        
        This is the preferred remote-GPU inference path:
        1. Vast tools provision and manage the remote GPU
        2. The current champion runtime is deployed to that node
        3. The requested model is loaded on the remote GPU
        4. The built-in OpenAI-compatible API server is started remotely
        5. The exposed endpoint is plugged locally as a normal council slot
        
        Args:
            instance_id: Instance ID
            model_id: HuggingFace model ID
            quantization: "none", "4bit", or "8bit"
        
        Returns:
            JSON with local attachment status and remote endpoint metadata

tools.name: vast_generate
tools.description:
Route generation through the locally attached remote-GPU slot.
        
        Vast direct generation is no longer the preferred path. Once a remote GPU
        has been attached locally, generation should flow through the normal slot
        system so sessions, workflows, compare, and debug all behave consistently.

tools.name: vast_embed
tools.description:
Report the preferred path for embeddings in the remote-slot architecture.
        
        Remote Vast embeddings should not be treated as a parallel inference world.
        The built-in API bridge is currently focused on LLM slot parity, so direct
        vast_embed is demoted to a manual/legacy path.

tools.name: vast_broadcast
tools.description:
Broadcast the same command to ALL connected GPU instances.
        
        Sends identical command to every GPU in _remote_gpus dict.
        Useful for fleet-wide operations like status checks, model loading,
        or synchronized inference.
        
        Args:
            command: TUI command to send to all GPUs (e.g., 'status', 'plug model_id')
        
        Returns:
            JSON with broadcast results from each GPU

tools.name: vast_distribute
tools.description:
Distribute different commands to specific GPU instances.
        
        Send unique commands to each GPU for parallel heterogeneous workloads.
        Perfect for distributed inference, A/B testing, or task sharding.
        
        Args:
            tasks: Dict mapping instance_id to command, e.g., {"12345": "plug model_a", "67890": "plug model_b"}
        
        Returns:
            JSON with results from each GPU

tools.name: bag_read_doc
tools.description: Read a FelixBag document by key with metadata.

tools.name: bag_list_docs
tools.description: List FelixBag documents (workspace-scoped view).

tools.name: bag_search_docs
tools.description: Semantic search over FelixBag documents.

tools.name: bag_tree
tools.description: Build a drillable tree view from FelixBag document keys.

tools.name: bag_checkpoint
tools.description: Create a checkpoint snapshot for a FelixBag document.

tools.name: bag_versions
tools.description: List checkpoint history for a FelixBag document.

tools.name: bag_diff
tools.description: Diff a document against checkpoints (or between checkpoints).

tools.name: bag_restore
tools.description: Restore a FelixBag document from a checkpoint snapshot.

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read a file/document from FelixBag workspace.

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Create or overwrite a file/document in FelixBag workspace.

tools.name: file_edit
tools.description: Surgical single replacement in a FelixBag file/document.

tools.name: file_append
tools.description: Append content to a FelixBag file/document (create if missing).

tools.name: file_prepend
tools.description: Prepend content to a FelixBag file/document (create if missing).

tools.name: file_delete
tools.description: Delete a FelixBag file/document by path.

tools.name: file_rename
tools.description: Rename/move a FelixBag file/document key.

tools.name: file_copy
tools.description: Copy a FelixBag file/document to a new path.

tools.name: file_list
tools.description: List FelixBag files/documents by path prefix and optional type.

tools.name: file_tree
tools.description: Build drillable directory tree for FelixBag virtual paths.

tools.name: file_search
tools.description: Semantic search over FelixBag files/documents.

tools.name: file_info
tools.description: Read metadata-only info for a FelixBag file/document.

tools.name: file_checkpoint
tools.description: Create checkpoint for a FelixBag file/document.

tools.name: file_versions
tools.description: List checkpoints/versions for a FelixBag file/document.

tools.name: file_diff
tools.description: Diff FelixBag file/document against checkpoints/current.

tools.name: file_restore
tools.description: Restore FelixBag file/document from checkpoint.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Run first-class web search (Brave, SearXNG, Serper).

tools.name: bag_catalog
tools.description:
List all items in the FelixBag memory.
        
        Args:
            filter_type: Optional filter ('model', 'text', 'file', etc.)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with bag contents

tools.name: bag_induct
tools.description:
Add content to the FelixBag memory.
        
        Args:
            key: Unique key for the item
            content: Content to store
            item_type: Type of content ('text', 'json', 'code', etc.)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with induction result

tools.name: bag_search
tools.description:
Semantic search in the FelixBag memory.
        
        Args:
            query: Search query
            limit: Max results to return
        
        Returns:
            JSON with matching items

tools.name: bag_forget
tools.description:
Remove item(s) from the FelixBag memory.

        Args:
            key: Single key to remove
            pattern: Prefix pattern for bulk delete (e.g. 'workflow_exec:*')

        Returns:
            JSON with status

tools.name: bag_export
tools.description:
Export the entire FelixBag to a file.
        
        Args:
            output_path: Optional output path (default: ./bag_export.json)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with export path

tools.name: unplug_slot
tools.description:
Remove a model from a council slot.
        
        Args:
            slot: Slot index to unplug
        
        Returns:

tools.name: clone_slot
tools.description:
Clone a model from one slot to create copies.
        
        Args:
            slot: Source slot to clone
            count: Number of clones to create
        
        Returns:

tools.name: mutate_slot
tools.description:
Mutate the adapter weights of a slot (evolutionary modification).
        
        Args:
            slot: Slot to mutate
            rate: Mutation rate (fraction of weights to change)
            scale: Mutation scale (magnitude of changes)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with mutation results

tools.name: rename_slot
tools.description:
Rename a council slot.
        
        Args:
            slot: Slot index
            new_name: New display name
        
        Returns:
            JSON with status

tools.name: swap_slots
tools.description:
Swap two council slots.
        
        Args:
            slot_a: First slot index
            slot_b: Second slot index
        
        Returns:
            JSON with status

tools.name: slot_info
tools.description:
Get detailed information about a specific slot.
        
        Args:
            slot: Slot index
        
        Returns:
            JSON with slot details

tools.name: get_slot_params
tools.description:
Get parameter counts for all slots.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with parameter info

tools.name: infer
tools.description:
Run full consensus inference through all council members.
        
        Args:
            text: Optional text input

tools.name: generate
tools.description:
Generate text using an LLM in a council slot.

        Returns:

tools.name: classify
tools.description:
Classify text using a classification model in a council slot.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to classify

tools.name: rerank
tools.description:
Rerank documents by relevance to a query.
        
        Args:
            query: Search query
            documents: List of documents to rank
        
        Returns:
            JSON with ranked documents

tools.name: broadcast
tools.description:
Broadcast a message to all council members and collect responses.
        
        Args:
            message: Message to broadcast
        
        Returns:
            JSON with all responses

tools.name: get_status
tools.description:
Get quick status of the capsule.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with status info

tools.name: get_artifacts
tools.description:
List all embedded artifacts in the capsule.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with artifact manifest

tools.name: get_readme
tools.description:
Get the embedded documentation/README.
        
        Returns:

tools.name: export_config
tools.description:
Export current brain configuration as JSON.

tools.name: save_state
tools.description:
Save current brain state to a file.
        
        Args:

tools.name: start_api_server
tools.description:
Start an HTTP API server (OpenAI-compatible).

tools.name: demo
tools.description:
Run demo inferences to test the capsule.
        
        Args:

tools.name: show_weights
tools.description:
Show adapter/LoRA weights for the brain.

            JSON with weight statistics

tools.name: show_dims
tools.description:
Show latent dimensions and architecture details.

            JSON with dimension info

tools.name: show_rssm
tools.description:
Show RSSM configuration (Dreamer brains).
        
        Returns:
            JSON with RSSM details

tools.name: show_lora
tools.description:
Show LoRA adapter configuration.
        
        Returns:

tools.name: get_identity
tools.description:
Get CASCADE identity information.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with identity details

tools.name: get_genesis
tools.description:
Get genesis/lineage information.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with genesis details

tools.name: export_interface
tools.description:
Export the interface documentation.
        
        Args:
            output_dir: Optional output directory

            JSON with export path

tools.name: export_docs

Export all documentation artifacts.

Spawn ephemeral quine clones that self-destruct after observation.

tools.description:
Run swarm orchestration - inference through all spawned clones.

Show clone family tree.

Emergency threat response - crystallize and freeze agent.

tools.name: defrost
tools.description:
Resume agent after implode (requires HOLD authorization).
        
        Args:

        Returns:

tools.name: is_frozen

Check if agent is in imploded (frozen) state.
        
        Returns:

tools.name: capture_model
tools.description:
Capture a HuggingFace model's artifacts to FelixBag.
        
        Args:
            model_id: HuggingFace model ID
        
        Returns:
            JSON with capture status

tools.name: grab_slot
tools.description:
Grab a slot's model info to FelixBag for later restore.
        
        Args:

tools.name: restore_slot
tools.description:
Restore a model from FelixBag to a slot.
        
        Args:

            slot: Target slot (optional, uses original if not specified)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with restore status

tools.name: summon
tools.description:
Semantic search in FelixBag and retrieve best matches.
        
        Args:
            query: Search query
            k: Number of results
        
        Returns:
            JSON with matched items

tools.name: pocket
tools.description:
Quick text storage in FelixBag.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to store
            key: Optional key (auto-generated if not provided)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with storage confirmation

tools.name: materialize
tools.description:
Export a FelixBag item to the filesystem.

Set the council consensus method.

        Returns:

tools.name: debate
tools.description:
Run multi-round debate among council members.
        
        Args:
            text: Topic/input for debate

        Returns:

tools.name: council_status
tools.description:
Get detailed council status.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with council details

tools.name: chain
tools.description:
Chain inference through specific slots in sequence.

        Args:
            text: Initial input text
            slot_sequence: List of slot indices to chain through

        Returns:
            JSON with chain results

tools.name: all_slots
tools.description:
Broadcast text to ALL slots and collect responses.

        Returns:

Export model to PyTorch format.

Export model to ONNX format.
        
        Args:

        Returns:
            JSON with export status

tools.name: export_quine

Export self-replicating quine copy.
        
        Args:
            output_path: Optional output path
        
        Returns:
            JSON with export status

tools.name: import_brain
tools.description:
Import brain state from file.
        
        Args:
            path: Path to brain file (.pkl or .pt)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with import status

tools.name: verify_hash
tools.description:
Verify quine brain hash integrity.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with verification result

tools.name: hub_plug
tools.description:
Download and plug a HuggingFace model in one step.
        
        Args:
            model_id: HuggingFace model ID
            slot_name: Optional slot name
        
        Returns:
            JSON with plug result

tools.name: hub_count
tools.description:
Count models on HuggingFace Hub.
        
        Args:
            task: Optional task filter
        
        Returns:
            JSON with model count

tools.name: asset_search
tools.description:
Search the CC0 asset registry by query and filters.

        Args:
            query: Semantic search text (optional - if empty, lists all and applies filters)
            source: Filter by source (kenney, quaternius, polyhaven, ambientcg)
            tags: Comma-separated tag filter (nature, space, buildings, etc.)
            license: License filter (CC0, CC-BY, etc.)
            format: File format filter (glb, gltf, hdr, png, etc.)
            limit: Max results (default 20)

        Returns:
            JSON with matching asset entries

tools.name: asset_register
tools.description:
Register an asset or pack in the CC0 asset registry.

        Args:
            name: Asset/pack name (required)
            source: Source identifier - kenney, quaternius, polyhaven, ambientcg, or custom (required)
            license: License - CC0, CC-BY, CC-BY-SA, etc. (default CC0)
            url: Download or source URL
            author: Author/creator name
            tags: Comma-separated tags
            format: File format - glb, gltf, obj, hdr, png, etc. (default glb)
            style: Visual style - low-poly, realistic, stylized
            poly_budget: Polygon budget - low, medium, high
            preview_url: Preview image URL
            download_url: Direct download URL (if different from source page url)
            download_mode: How to acquire - direct_file, archive, or catalog_only (default direct_file)
            download_ext: Expected file extension of download (e.g. .zip, .glb)
            description: Human-readable description

        Returns:
            Confirmation JSON

tools.name: asset_download
tools.description:
Download an asset file from the registry to local cache.

        Args:
            asset_key: FelixBag key (e.g. 'asset_pack:kenney:nature-kit') or asset ID (e.g. 'kenney/nature-kit')
            destination: Local file path (optional - defaults to .asset_cache/<source>/<filename>)

        Returns:
            JSON with local file path or error

tools.name: asset_list
tools.description:
List registered assets with optional filters.

        Args:
            source: Filter by source (kenney, quaternius, polyhaven, ambientcg)
            license: Filter by license (CC0, CC-BY, etc.)
            format: Filter by format (glb, hdr, png, etc.)
            style: Filter by style (low-poly, realistic, etc.)
            page: Page number (default 1)
            limit: Results per page (default 20)

        Returns:
            JSON with paginated asset list

tools.name: asset_catalog
tools.description:
Get an overview of the asset registry - counts by source, license, format, style.

        Returns:
            JSON with registry statistics

tools.name: vast_connect
tools.description:
Connect to a Vast.ai instance so it can be prepared for local slot attachment.
        
        Args:
            instance_id: Instance ID to connect to
        
        Returns:
            JSON with connection status

tools.name: observe
tools.description:
Universal signal observation port - log data to CASCADE.
        
        Args:
            data: Data to observe/log
            signal_type: Type of signal ('generic', 'metric', 'event', 'error')
        
        Returns:
            JSON with observation receipt

tools.name: feed
tools.description:
Show recent CASCADE events/observations.
        
        Args:
            n: Number of events to show
        
        Returns:
            JSON with recent events

tools.name: diagnose_file
tools.description:
Run CASCADE diagnostics on a Python file.
        
        Uses SymbioticAdapter, CodeTracer, and BugDetector to analyze code
        for potential issues, anomalies, and patterns.
        
        Args:
            file_path: Path to Python file to analyze
        
        Returns:
            JSON with diagnostic findings

tools.name: diagnose_directory
tools.description:
Run CASCADE diagnostics on an entire directory.
        
        Args:
            dir_path: Path to directory to analyze
        
        Returns:
            JSON with diagnostic report

tools.name: symbiotic_interpret
tools.description:
Use CASCADE SymbioticAdapter to interpret a signal.
        
        The SymbioticAdapter provides universal signal interpretation -
        it can analyze text, error messages, stack traces, or any signal
        and return structured insights.
        
        Args:
            signal: Text signal to interpret (error, log, trace, etc.)
        
        Returns:
            JSON with interpretation result

tools.name: trace_root_causes
tools.description:
Use CASCADE Tracer to find root causes of an issue.
        
        Args:
            event_description: Description of the event/issue to trace
        
        Returns:
            JSON with root cause analysis

tools.name: forensics_analyze
tools.description:
Run CASCADE forensics analysis on data.
        
        Uses DataForensics and ArtifactDetector to analyze data for
        patterns, fingerprints, and inferred operations.
        
        Args:
            data: Text/JSON data to analyze
        
        Returns:
            JSON with forensics report

tools.name: hold_yield
tools.description:
Create a HOLD yield point for human inspection.

        This pauses inference and yields to human oversight.
        The human can inspect, modify, or approve the data.

        Args:
            reason: Why this hold point was triggered
            data: Data to present for inspection

        Returns:
            JSON with hold status

tools.name: hold_resolve
tools.description:
Resolve a pending HOLD point.

        Args:
            hold_id: ID of the hold to resolve
            action: 'accept', 'override', or 'cancel'

        Returns:
            JSON with resolution result

tools.name: metrics_analyze
tools.description:
Analyze a metric series for anomalies and health.
        
        Uses CASCADE MetricsEngine to classify metrics and detect issues.
        
        Args:
            metric_name: Name of the metric (e.g., 'loss', 'accuracy')
            values: List of numeric values
        
        Returns:
            JSON with metric analysis

tools.name: relay_status
tools.description:
Get relay center status.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with relay status

tools.name: relay_send
tools.description:
Send a command through the relay center.
        
        Args:
            command: Command to send to TUI
        
        Returns:
            JSON with send status

tools.name: cull_slot
tools.description:
Remove clones from a slot.

            JSON with cull result

tools.name: load_manifest
tools.description:
Load slot configuration from manifest file.

tools.name: load_bag
tools.description:
Load items from a bag file into FelixBag.

            JSON with load result

tools.name: save_bag
tools.description:
Save FelixBag contents to a file.

tools.name: toggle_relay
tools.description:
Toggle relay listening mode.

tools.name: get_embedder_info
tools.description:
Get information about the current embedder.

            JSON with embedder details

tools.description:
Get information about this capsule.

            JSON with capsule info

tools.description:
List popular models that can be plugged.

tools.name: get_onboarding

COMPREHENSIVE ONBOARDING - Read this first!

tools.name: get_quickstart
tools.description:

tools.name: get_help
tools.description:
Get help on any tool, category, or the system overall.

        Args:

                   Examples: 'cascade_graph', 'workflow', 'bag_put', 'environment'

        Returns:
            JSON with targeted help content

tools.name: heartbeat
tools.description:
Lightweight status check for async monitoring.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with alive status, uptime, and key metrics

tools.name: spawn_tui
tools.description:
Spawn the embedded TUI as a subprocess for visualization.
        
        The TUI provides real-time visualization of:
        - Inference results and latency
        - Council deliberations and votes
        - Memory operations
        - Evolution metrics
        
        Args:
            detached: If True, run TUI in background. If False, block until TUI exits.
        
        Returns:
            JSON with status and process info

tools.name: workflow_test
tools.description:
Test that the workflow engine is embedded correctly.

tools.name: workflow_execute
tools.description:
Execute a workflow by ID.

            input_data: JSON string of input data (optional)

            JSON with execution result

tools.name: workflow_list
tools.description:
List all available workflows.

tools.name: workflow_create
tools.description:
Create a new workflow from JSON definition.

        Args:

            JSON with created workflow ID

tools.name: workflow_get
tools.description:
Get a workflow definition by ID.

tools.name: workflow_update

Update an existing workflow.

tools.name: workflow_status
tools.description:

tools.name: cascade_graph
tools.description:
CausationGraph operations for causal reasoning.

        Operations: create, add_event, add_link, get_causes, get_effects, recent, connections, stats

        Args:

            params: JSON string with operation parameters

tools.description:
ProvenanceChain, Identity, and Genesis operations.

tools.description:
Dataset observation - PII scanning, schema inference, license analysis.

        Operations: pii_scan, schema, license_check, observe

            JSON with operation result

tools.description:
Universal log/file ingestion and MoE analysis.

SDK auto-patching for LLM provider telemetry.

tools.description:
Tape recording and Kleene/Interpretive logging.

        Operations: tape_write, tape_read, tape_list, log_kleene, log_interpretive, session_stats

        Args:
            operation: Operation name
            params: JSON string with operation parameters

            JSON with operation result

tools.name: cascade_proxy
tools.description:
LLM API proxy for intercepting and observing API calls.

        Operations: start, stop, status

        Args:
            operation: Operation name
            params: JSON string with operation parameters

        Returns:
            JSON with operation result

tools.name: env_spawn
tools.description:
Spawn a new object in the Environment tab 3D scene.

        Creates an arbitrary scene object that appears in both the CSS 2.5D
        and Three.js WebGL renderers. The object persists in the scene until
        removed. Also stored in FelixBag for cross-session persistence.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with object definition:
                - kind: Object type (e.g. 'npc', 'marker', 'zone', 'prop', or any custom kind)
                - id: Unique identifier (auto-generated if omitted)
                - label: Display label
                - x: Horizontal position (0-100 coordinate space)
                - y: Vertical position (0-100 coordinate space)
                - scale: Size multiplier (default 1.0)
                - tilt: Rotation degrees
                - color: Hex color string (e.g. '#ff6633')
                - meta: Description text shown on hover
                - state: Object state ('idle', 'running', 'error', 'done')
                - category: Category string for visual grouping
                - data: Arbitrary JSON data payload
                - html: Custom HTML overlay content for CSS2DRenderer

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical env contract and spawned object confirmation

tools.name: env_mutate
tools.description:
Update an existing object in the Environment tab scene.

        Modifies properties of a previously spawned object. The object is
        identified by kind + id. Only provided fields are updated.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with mutation:
                - kind: Object type (required for lookup)
                - id: Object identifier (required for lookup)
                - label: New display label
                - meta: New description text
                - state: New state ('idle', 'running', 'error', 'done')
                - x: New horizontal position
                - y: New vertical position
                - scale: New size multiplier
                - tilt: New rotation degrees
                - color: New hex color string
                - data: New data payload (merged with existing)
                - html: New HTML overlay content

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical env contract and mutation confirmation

tools.name: env_remove
tools.description:
Remove an object from the Environment tab scene.

        Removes a spawned object by kind and id. Also removes the
        persisted copy from FelixBag.

        Args:
            kind: Object type
            id: Object identifier

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical env contract and removal confirmation

tools.name: env_read
tools.description:
Read current Environment tab scene state.

        Queries the persisted scene objects from FelixBag plus the mirrored
        live Environment payload when the browser sync bridge is active.

        Args:
            query: What to read:
                - 'list': List all persisted scene objects
                - 'object:<kind>:<id>': Get specific object
                - 'kinds': List distinct object kinds
                - 'snapshot': Full scene contract snapshot from FelixBag
                - 'live': Mirrored live Environment payload published by the browser
                - 'shared_state': Live shared_state sub-payload
                - 'contracts': Live contracts snapshot
                - 'habitat_objects': Live habitat object list

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical env contract and scene state payload

tools.name: env_control
tools.description:
Execute a control command in the Environment tab.

        Forwards an Environment/theater command into the live browser shell.
        The server/browser theater stack is the authoritative command surface;
        this runtime adds best-effort effect hints and live-state excerpts.

        Args:
            command: Environment/theater control command string. Common families
                include focus_*, camera_*, capture_*, surface_*, workbench_*,
                character_*, profile/recipe controls, and theater/profile flows.
            target_id: Target object identifier for focus commands
            actor: Actor name for the action ledger

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical env contract and command confirmation

tools.name: workstation_bind
tools.description:
Bind an existing environment object as a workstation.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with kind, id, facility_id, and optional role

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical environment contract

tools.name: workstation_unbind
tools.description:
Remove facility workstation metadata from an environment object.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with kind and id

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical environment contract

tools.name: workstation_list
tools.description:
List bound workstations in the persisted environment scene.

        Args:
            params: Optional JSON string with facility_id filter

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical environment contract

tools.name: facility_create
tools.description:
Create or update a facility blueprint in FelixBag.

        Args:
            params: JSON string describing the facility blueprint

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical environment contract

tools.name: facility_list
tools.description:
List facility blueprints stored in FelixBag.

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical environment contract

tools.name: facility_bind
tools.description:
Bind facility roles to existing environment objects.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with facility_id and bindings list

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical environment contract

tools.name: facility_activate
tools.description:
Activate a facility by upserting its workstations and surfaces into the scene.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with facility_id

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical environment contract

tools.name: skill_save
tools.description:
Save a workflow definition as a reusable skill record.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with skill metadata and workflow_id

        Returns:
            JSON with created skill record

tools.name: skill_search
tools.description:
Search reusable skills by semantic similarity or textual fallback.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with query and optional limit

        Returns:
            JSON with ranked skill results

tools.name: skill_apply
tools.description:
Create a workflow instance from a saved skill template.

        Args:
            params: JSON string with skill_id, optional inputs, and optional execute flag

        Returns:
            JSON with created workflow id and optional execution result

tools.name: env_persist
tools.description:
Save, load, or export Environment tab scene configurations.

        Manages scene persistence through FelixBag. Supports saving scene
        snapshots, loading saved scenes, exporting for product finalization,
        and syncing mirrored live theater state from the browser.

        Args:
            operation: Operation to perform:
                - 'snapshot': Save current scene objects to FelixBag as a named snapshot
                - 'load': Load a previously saved snapshot
                - 'list': List all saved snapshots
                - 'export': Export scene config for spawn_quine product bundling
                - 'clear': Remove all persisted scene objects
                - 'sync_live': Persist the browser's mirrored live Environment payload
                - 'prune_snapshots': Remove stale or explicitly named snapshots from FelixBag
            params: JSON string with operation parameters:
                - For snapshot: {"name": "my_scene"} (optional, auto-named if omitted)
                - For load: {"name": "my_scene"}
                - For export: {"include_slots": true} to include slot role definitions
                - For sync_live: {"payload": {... live environment state ...}}
                - For prune_snapshots: {"empty_only": true} or {"names": ["scene_a", "scene_b"]}

        Returns:
            JSON with canonical env contract and persistence payload
